title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
